text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... At last. At long last! My super secret
recipe is complete!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Papa always said an athlete needs to watch what
they eat... and I plan to do just that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
With this raw egg, chicken breast and habanero
drink in my arsenal, I shall soon be invincible,
unstoppable, and SUPER SWOLE!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The trick is... to hold your nose while you down it
in one gulp.
